technologies.name: yt-dlp

technologies.name: langchain
technologies.description: LangChain is an open-source framework for building applications powered by large language models. It provides components for chaining LLM interactions, building agents, memory management, and integrating with various data sources. Widely used for AI application development, RAG systems, and chatbot construction.
